title: Debt or liability
doc_html:
§288. Debt or liability

            No evidence of debt issued by the corporation shall be deemed to constitute a debt, liability, or obligation of the state, a state agency, or any political subdivision thereof.

            Acts 2025, No. 512, §1.
doc_text:
§288.  Debt or liability
No evidence of debt issued by the corporation shall be deemed to constitute a debt,
liability, or obligation of the state, a state agency, or any political subdivision thereof.
Acts 2025, No. 512, §1.
